messages.content: Hi there! I'm just a virtual assistant, so I don't have feelings, but I'm here and ready to help! How can I assist you today? 😊
food, looks like your formatting is working now
Thanks for noticing! 😊 I'm glad the formatting is working well now. How can I assist you with food-related topics? Whether it's recipes, meal ideas, or cooking tips—I'm here to help! 🍴
